title: Gate Decision Result
description: Platform-level schema for a gate decision result within the PDP Decision Envelope. See docs/gate-decision.md for full semantics, mapping rules, and customization boundaries.

gate_level.description: Gate level determined by PDP. Semantics defined in gate-decision.md and governance-flow.md.

review_state_entry.description: Recommended initial review state based on gate level. 'proposed' for inform (fast path) or pending submission; 'waiting_review' for review/approve gates.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why the current gate level was chosen.

triggering_rules.description: List of rule identifiers that influenced this gate decision.

override.description: Present when the gate decision overrides the default gate level. Records the override for auditability.

original_gate_level.description: The default gate level that was overridden.

override_source.description: Source of the override (e.g., pack rule name, user instruction).

fast_path_eligible.description: Whether this decision qualifies for the inform fast path (proposed -> applied, skipping waiting_review). Should be true when gate_level is 'inform'.
